title: Skyimprover
body:
Skyimprover

Skyimprover for Minecraft Fabric 1.20.2 is a feature-rich quality of life mod designed for improving your gameplay experience in Hypixel Skyblock.

Features

Kuudra Waypoints: Adds waypoints for supply crates and for ballista building. M3 Fire Freeze Timer: A timer for when to use the fire freeze staff in M3. Ferocity Counter: A counter for ferocity hits.


Compatibility Requirements:


Requires:

Midnightlib, ModMenu
